channel.title: Home on CJ's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Home on CJ's Blog

item.title: Reflections on an AAI Hut Trip
item.description: At the end of January 2026 I took a 3-day AAI Avalanche Level 1 course through Colorado Mountain School. The course is offered in a hybrid capacity but I opted for one the hut-versions which take place at several 10th Mountain Division huts. Living in Denver, I knew the front range would be my closest and primary ski range, so the Broome Hut made the most sense. Meeting up at the Berthoud Pass warming hut, our group were the only cars in the lot.

item.title: First
item.description: Welcome! This is my attempt at an all-in-one blog; a place to document all the different projects in my life. Security, gardening, cars, skiing - it’s all here! So welcome :)
